title: bowlesia tripartita var. axilliflora
intro: Bowlesia tripartita var. axilliflora, also known as three-lobed bowlesia, is a plant species belonging to the Carrot or parsley family, Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Bowlesia tripartita var. axilliflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
